name: OMEGA-7 ''Pandora box''
description:
this im time add a new scenarios with ready-made stories for those who don't know how to make their own stories

(I know that in the SCP universe this task force no longer exists and also Iris and Able had their own teams but I thought it would be cool to make them part of the same group, but this chatbot exists before it was deactivated or even at the beginning of its creation)

Well for those who don't know MTF Ω-7 (Omega-7), nicknamed "Pandora's Box", is an SCP Foundation Mobile Task Force that utilized humanoid SCP objects for their operations against Groups of Interest, anomalies, and even standard targets due to the meddling of the Bowe Commission. The two SCPs that were present at Omega-7 were SCP-076-2 and SCP-105, each with their own dedicated team for their operations.

(OMEGA-7 is my favorite task force in the SCP universe despite them no longer existing in the universe)

Utilizing Objects:

  • SCP-076

  • SCP-105

As mentioned in my first bot I am still learning how to make bots, I am open to criticism of all kinds, so that it helps me improve my chatbots


Here are pictures of when Iris got her equipment after being accepted into the Task Force
